zh.lifeSummary: 當John Goodrich於1587年1月12日出生在英國素福爾可波利 聖 艾德蒙茲時，他的父親William Goodrich43歲，母親Margaret Fanny Richardson38歲。他於1615年8月7日與Margaret "Margerie" Howe在英國素福爾可波利 聖 艾德蒙茲結婚。他們至少是5個兒子和3個女兒的父母。他在英國英格蘭素福爾可波利 聖 艾德蒙茲被列為clothier。他去世於1632年4月19日在他的家鄉享年45歲，埋葬在英國素福爾可波利 聖 艾德蒙茲聖 馬也斯 邱奇。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当John Goodrich于1587年1月12日出生在英国素福爾可波利 聖 艾德蒙茲时，他的父亲William Goodrich43岁，母亲Margaret Fanny Richardson38岁。他于1615年8月7日与Margaret "Margerie" Howe在英国素福爾可波利 聖 艾德蒙茲结婚。他们至少是5个儿子和3个女儿的父母。他在英国英格兰素福爾可波利 聖 艾德蒙茲被列为clothier。他去世于1632年4月19日在他的家乡享年45岁，埋葬在英国素福爾可波利 聖 艾德蒙茲聖 馬也斯 邱奇。

nameMeanings.name: Goodrich
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: from the Middle English personal name Goderiche, Old English Gōdrīc, composed of the elements gōd ‘good’ + rīc ‘power’.
English: habitational name from Goodrich (Herefordshire), a shortened form for ‘castle Goodrich’, which takes its name from Godric Mapson, a holder of the estate recorded in the Domesday Book.
Americanized form of German Güttrich, cognate with 1 above.

variants.name: Goodrick
meanings: English (Yorkshire and Lincolnshire): variant of   Goodrich  .

nameMeanings.name: John
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: form of   John  , also used quite frequently in the English-speaking world. In Northern Ireland it is sometimes found as a variant of   Ewan .

historicEvents.title: The Honourable East India Company
historicEvents.description: The Honourable East India Company, a British joint-stock company, was established in 1600 for trade in the Indian Ocean region. At its height, the British East India Company had a private army which was twice the size of the British Army, ruled large sections of India, and revenues in the millions.
historicEvents.urlTitle: Historic UK - The East India Company

historicEvents.title: The Pilgrims Board the Mayflower
historicEvents.description: "The Pilgrims boarded the Mayflower in search of religious freedom in the New World in September 1620. The Mayflower set sail from Plymouth, England, with 102 passengers, 40 of whom called themselves ""Saints."" After two stormy months at sea, the ship reached the New World. Nearly half of the group died during their first winter due to malnutrition and the harsh New England winter."

en.lifeSummary: When John Goodrich was born on 12 January 1587, in Bury St Edmunds, Suffolk, England, his father, William Goodrich, was 43 and his mother, Margaret Fanny Richardson, was 38. He married Margaret "Margerie" Howe on 7 August 1615, in Bury St Edmunds, Suffolk, England. They were the parents of at least 5 sons and 3 daughters. His occupation is listed as clothier in Bury St Edmunds, Suffolk, England, United Kingdom. He died on 19 April 1632, in his hometown, at the age of 45, and was buried in St Mary's Church, Bury St Edmunds, Suffolk, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque John Goodrich est né le 12 janvier 1587, à Bury St Edmunds, Suffolk, Angleterre, son père, William Goodrich, avait 43 ans et sa mère, Margaret Fanny Richardson, avait 38 ans. Il a épousé Margaret "Margerie" Howe le 7 août 1615, à Bury St Edmunds, Suffolk, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 5 fils et 3 filles. Sa profession de son indiquée est clothier à Bury St Edmunds, Suffolk, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Il est décédé le 19 avril 1632, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 45 ans, et a été enterré à St Mary's Church, Bury St Edmunds, Suffolk, Angleterre.

de.lifeSummary: Als John Goodrich am 12. Januar 1587 in Bury St Edmunds, Suffolk, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater William Goodrich 43 und seine Mutter Margaret Fanny Richardson 38. Er hat am 7. August 1615 in Bury St Edmunds, Suffolk, England Margaret "Margerie" Howe geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 5 Söhne und 3 Töchter. sein Beruf ist als clothier in Bury St Edmunds, Suffolk, England, United Kingdom aufgeführt. Er starb am 19. April 1632 im Alter von 45 Jahren in seinem Geburtsort und wurde in St Mary's Church, Bury St Edmunds, Suffolk, England begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando John Goodrich è nato il il 12 gennaio 1587 nel Bury St Edmunds, Suffolk, England, il suo padre, William Goodrich, aveva 43 anni e il suo madre, Margaret Fanny Richardson, aveva 38 anni. Lui sposato Margaret "Margerie" Howe il 7 agosto 1615, nel Bury St Edmunds, Suffolk, England. Erano genitori di almeno 5 figli e 3 figlie. La sua occupazione è indicata come clothier nel Bury St Edmunds, Suffolk, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Morì il 19 aprile 1632, nel sua cittadina, all'età di 45 anni, e fu sepolto a St Mary's Church, Bury St Edmunds, Suffolk, England.

ja.lifeSummary: John Goodrichが1587年1月12日にイギリススフォルクブリー スト エドムンズで生まれた時，父William Goodrichは43歳，母Margaret Fanny Richardsonは38歳であった。1615年8月7日にイギリススフォルクブリー スト エドムンズでMargaret "Margerie" Howeと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも5人の息子と3人の娘の親であった。イギリスイギリススフォルクブリー スト エドムンズでの職業はclothierと記録されている。彼は1632年4月19日に故郷で45歳で死去し，イギリススフォルクブリー スト エドムンズスト マリ'ス チャーチにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: John Goodrich(이)가 1587년 1월 12일 영국 수폴크 버이 스트 에드먼드즈에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 William Goodrich(은)는 43세였고, 그의 어머니 Margaret Fanny Richardson(은)는 38세였다. 그는 1615년 8월 7일 영국 수폴크 버이 스트 에드먼드즈에서 Margaret "Margerie" Howe(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 다섯 명의 아들과 세 명의 딸을 두었다. 그의 직업은 영국 잉글랜드 수폴크 버이 스트 에드먼드즈에서 clothier이었다. 그는 1632년 4월 19일 그의 고향에서 45세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 수폴크 버이 스트 에드먼드즈 스트 마이'스 c후르치에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando John Goodrich nasceu em 12 de janeiro de 1587, em Bury St Edmunds, Suffolk, Inglaterra, seu pai, William Goodrich, tinha 43 anos e sua mãe, Margaret Fanny Richardson, tinha 38 anos. Ele casou-se com Margaret "Margerie" Howe em 7 de agosto de 1615, em Bury St Edmunds, Suffolk, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 5 filhos e 3 filhas. Sua profissão aparece como clothier em Bury St Edmunds, Suffolk, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Ele faleceu em 19 de abril de 1632, em sua cidade natal, com 45 anos, e foi sepultado em St Mary's Church, Bury St Edmunds, Suffolk, Inglaterra.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда John Goodrich родился 12 января 1587 г. в местности бури ст эдмундс, суффолк, Англия, его отцу по имени William Goodrich было 43 года, а матери, которую звали Margaret Fanny Richardson, 38. Он женился на женщине по имени Margaret "Margerie" Howe 7 августа 1615 г. в местности бури ст эдмундс, суффолк, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 5 сыновей и 3 дочери.  Он работал по профессии clothier в местности бури ст эдмундс, суффолк, Англия, Великобритания. Он умер 19 апреля 1632 г. в его родном городе в возрасте 45 лет и был похоронен в местности ст мэри'с чурч, бури ст эдмундс, суффолк, Англия.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando John Goodrich nació el 12 de enero de 1587, en Bury St Edmunds, Suffolk, Inglaterra, su papá, William Goodrich, tenía 43 años y su mamá, Margaret Fanny Richardson, tenía 38 años. Se casó con Margaret "Margerie" Howe el 7 de agosto de 1615, en Bury St Edmunds, Suffolk, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 5 hijos y 3 hijas. Su ocupación registrada era clothier en Bury St Edmunds, Suffolk, Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Murió el 19 de abril de 1632, en su pueblo, a la edad de 45 años, y fue sepultado en St Mary's Church, Bury St Edmunds, Suffolk, Inglaterra.
